fields.title: Add /memories command to list all memories
fields.description:
Create a new /memories slash command that displays all memories in a nice interface.

Acceptance criteria:
- Register /memories command
- Shows all scopes (project, global, user) in one view
- Each entry shows: nano-id, preview, size, scope
- Colorized and formatted like beads output
fields.notes: Implemented /memories as a UI-only slash command. Added a detailed curated-memory snapshot API exposing ids across project/global/user scopes, registered a custom memories renderer with beads-style formatting and per-scope summaries, and added runtime/renderer tests. Verification: npm run gate passed in extensions/tau/ (typecheck, lint, tests: 189/189).
fields.close_reason: Implemented: /memories command shows all scopes with nano-id, preview, size, scope - colorized like beads
